scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start -w @sportshop/host" "npm run start -w @sportshop/catalog" "npm run start -w @sportshop/orders"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @sportshop/webpack-config && npm run build -w @sportshop/catalog && npm run build -w @sportshop/orders && npm run build -w @sportshop/host
